name: Mrs Fields Choconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine almond paste and sugar in a medium bowl.
3. Using your fingers, work the paste into sugar completely.
4. Add coconut and chocolate chips and stir to combine.
5. In a clean medium-sized bowl, beat egg whites until fluffy using absolutely clean beaters.
6. Add cream of tartar and beat on high until stiff peaks form.
7. Add half of the beaten egg whites to the coconut mixture and combine to lighten.
8. Fold in the remaining whites gently, being careful not to deflate.
9. Drop by rounded teaspoons onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
10. Bake for 20 minutes until tops are lightly browned.
11. Cool for 1 minute on cookie sheets before transferring cookies to a cool surface.
